message:
fix: increase Dolt retry to 10 attempts with exponential backoff + jitter (gt-nv8bk)

Band-aid for current operations while AT migration builds.

Changes:
- Increase doltMaxRetries from 3 to 10 in both manager.go and sling.go
- Replace linear backoff with exponential backoff (500ms base, 2x, 30s cap)
- Add ±25% jitter to prevent thundering herd on concurrent retries
- Add isDoltOptimisticLockError() to recognize optimistic lock/serialization
  failures as retryable Dolt errors
- Treat optimistic lock errors in CheckDoltHealth as "Dolt is alive" signal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
